examples: He's such a weenie that he cares more about what other people think than about me.
Weenie, I am coming for you, buddy.
"Well, " the parrot says, "this is very embarrassing but since you asked, I wrap my weenie around this wooden bar like a little hook.
The effect was many things--proto-guru, neo-Nehru, bandwidth bobo, Euro-weenie--they all definitely said New Economy.
